prompts: Use PR Completion to validate and commit my task-related changes, create or find each pull request, shepherd it through its gates, then ask me separately before requesting a protected landing for each exact ready head.

Use PR Completion to find changes owned by this parent repository and its submodules, validate and commit each owner, then continue through PR creation and monitoring; stop after commits only if I explicitly say local-only.
Use PR Completion to diagnose the failed checks on this pull request, fix only branch-caused failures, validate the repair, push it, and resume watching the new head.
Use PR Completion to triage every unresolved review thread against the current code, fix real findings, explain stale or false-positive findings with evidence, and return the PR to merge readiness.

Use PR Completion to resolve the upstream conflicts on this pull-request branch without rewriting history or force-pushing, validate the combined behavior, and resume the watcher through readiness and per-PR landing confirmation.
